session.name: Auto-mask session-temp persistence and active-entry remount bug

goal.original: Implement auto-detected mask persistence through the same session-temp mechanism used by manual masks, preserving the scope: auto masks should match manual masks for now, not become project-durable.
goal.summary: Auto mask temp persistence is implemented and verified for entry switching, preview/canvas swap, and destroy/remount when the auto state is already in temp. The remaining user-reported bug is that leaving the currently active History entry, going to Gallery, and returning to History still clears that active entry's combined mask in the real app.

completed: Extended Electron mask-temp IPC and frontend maskTempStore to read/write/delete auto mask state as session-temp auto.json alongside manual.png and subtract.png.

Updated MpiCanvasViewer to persist/restore auto masks from session temp, include auto layers in preview composites, and avoid clearing auto picks when auto-mask model/mode initialization receives unchanged values.
Added desktop coverage for mask-temp auto IPC and a viewer destroy/remount combined manual+auto restore path.
Verified syntax, component lint, full JS lint, and desktop tests after the latest patch.
pending: Investigate and fix the real-app active-entry navigation path: leave History with an active combined mask, go to Gallery, return to the same History entry, and confirm the mask remains.

Determine whether the issue is ordering/race in History block teardown/remount, active item load timing, selectedIndex/current item mismatch, or options/prompt lifecycle clearing the mask after restore.
After fixing, add or adjust a regression test that better models Gallery -> History navigation, not just direct viewer destroy/remount.
Ask the user whether .claude/rules/ should be updated after the behavior is finalized.

allowed_actions: own and integrate the uncommitted files changed by the outgoing Codex session except dev_configs/app_config.js
update docs or rules only if explicitly approved by the user

completed: Captured the current remaining active-entry remount bug and the implementation/test state in this handoff.
Marked outgoing file claims as needs_integration so the next session can take ownership.
pending: Do not commit or close the MPI session until the active-entry navigation bug is fixed and verified.
If rules/docs need updates for auto-mask session-temp behavior, ask the user first per CLAUDE.md documentation drift rule.

next_action.description: Investigate why the currently active History entry's combined AutoMask + manual mask is cleared after navigating to Gallery and back to History, then fix that real-app navigation/remount path while preserving the session-temp-only scope.

key_decisions: Auto masks remain session-temp only, matching manual/subtract masks for now; do not persist auto masks to project.json or .meta sidecars.
Auto mask temp state is stored per project/group/item under the same mask-temp key as manual/subtract as auto.json.
The next agent has ownership of the uncommitted files changed by this Codex session. dev_configs/app_config.js is explicitly user-owned and must not be touched unless the user asks.
constraints: Browser dev mode has no Electron IPC; mask temp persistence remains disabled there by design.
There is no active plan file attached; this handoff is the active plan.
Existing full npm lint has 28 warnings outside the touched code; do not treat those as introduced failures.
A direct viewer destroy/remount desktop test now passes, so the remaining bug likely involves the real Group History/Gallery navigation lifecycle or active item restore order.
